### Checklist

- [ ] If adding a YAML entry, `composer validate-data` passes locally.
- [ ] If touching PHP, `composer test` is green locally.
- [ ] I didn't hand-edit `README.md`, `events.ical`, or `events.json` — CI regenerates these on merge.
- [ ] For new entries: the upstream project has a README, at least one release, and is genuinely actively maintained.
